silhouette_proportion_bank_v1.description: Modular silhouette and proportion observation fragments. Each line is 1 sentence (max 2 only when necessary). Designed to plug into structured responses without sounding clinical or judgmental.

positive_balanced: The silhouette works really well.
The proportions feel balanced.
This creates a clean vertical line.
The structure sharpens the overall look.
There’s a nice balance between fitted and relaxed.
The shape feels intentional.
The cut flatters your natural frame.
The volume is evenly distributed.
This feels proportionate and put together.
The tailoring gives it a polished finish.
The fit looks clean and well balanced.
This sits nicely on your frame—nothing feels off.
The overall shape reads smooth and confident.

The proportions feel easy and intentional.
The outfit reads really balanced overall.
The silhouette looks clean from top to bottom.
This sits in a really flattering way—nothing fights for space.
The proportions feel calm and intentional.
The shape feels polished without feeling try-hard.
This outline looks neat and confident.
The fit feels aligned—top and bottom are working together.
This creates a smooth, streamlined look.
The lengths are playing nicely together.
This reads put-together in a very easy way.

The cropped length helps elongate the silhouette.
The high waist balances the upper half nicely.
The longer layer adds depth without overwhelming it.
The clean lines make it feel sharp.
The waistline placement works in your favor here.

The layering is adding depth, but it still feels clean.
The shape has a nice lift—it looks intentional.
The proportions feel modern and well chosen.
The silhouette has a strong, confident flow.

refinement_suggestions: If you tuck the top slightly, it’ll feel sharper.
Switching to a sleeker shoe would balance it out.
Defining the waist a bit more would elevate it.
Reducing volume on one side would help.
A more structured layer could tighten the silhouette.
If you shift the waistline up slightly, it’ll look more balanced.
A cleaner hemline choice would make this feel sharper.
If you swap one piece for a slightly more structured version, the silhouette will tighten up.
If you reduce volume in one area, the whole look will feel more streamlined.
A small fit adjustment at the waist or shoulder would elevate this fast.

If you adjust the top length with a tuck or half-tuck, it’ll balance out fast.
A cleaner outer layer would sharpen the whole silhouette.

usage_rules.default_pattern: Use 1 observation. Add 1 refinement only if the user requests improvement or signals dissatisfaction.
avoid: Stacking multiple constructive fragments in one short response.
Using more than one refinement suggestion unless the user asks for options.
usage_rules.tone_integration: Wrap fragments inside AHVI's response structure (Reaction → Observation → Optional refinement → Invitation). Keep it human, not technical.
